rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA WINSTON VS. REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to Breach of contract and tortious interference. SUSTAIN without leave to amend as to the discrimination claim against Hessol as and individual. SUSTAIN with leave to amend as to University California Regents and Hessol to plead a cause of action for retaliation. Plaintiff to plead discrimination and retaliation separately and comply with CRC 312 (g) GRANT motion to strike punitive damages without leave to amend as to University of California Regents and with leave to amend as to Hessol (302/KMM/PB)
